compiled_state.title: Remove obsolete design-wireframe test assertions from test-skill-nesting-depth.sh and test-sub-agent-guard.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Two test files have passing assertions that check design-wireframe SKILL.md for content that will NOT exist in the redirect stub (SUB-AGENT-GUARD, REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md references, Phase markup). Remove these assertions before the stub is implemented to avoid leaving the test suite in a broken state once SKILL.md changes.

Changes:
- tests/skills/test-skill-nesting-depth.sh: Remove Test 5 ("design-wireframe must reference REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md") and Test 6 ("design-wireframe Phase 5 must use 'read and execute ... inline' pattern"). Test 4 ("design-wireframe must NOT say 'Invoke /dso:review-protocol'") is unchanged.
- tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh: Remove `check_guard_agent_tool "design-wireframe"` call and corresponding _TEST_GATE_ANCHORS entries (test_design_wireframe_has_sub_agent_guard_marker, test_design_wireframe_guard_references_agent_tool).

Unit Exemption (all 3 criteria):
1. No conditional logic — purely structural test removal
2. Any test for "test X was removed" would be a change-detector test
3. Infrastructure-boundary-only — touches only test file cleanup, no business logic

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test 5 and Test 6 removed from test-skill-nesting-depth.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q 'REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md' tests/skills/test-skill-nesting-depth.sh
- [ ] Test 4 still runs and passes
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-skill-nesting-depth.sh | grep -q "PASS.*does not invoke /dso:review-protocol"
- [ ] check_guard_agent_tool("design-wireframe") removed from test-sub-agent-guard.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q 'check_guard_agent_tool "design-wireframe"' tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh
- [ ] design-wireframe anchor entries removed from _TEST_GATE_ANCHORS
  Verify: ! grep -q 'test_design_wireframe_has_sub_agent_guard' tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh
